# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the issue(s) you solved.

## Review Scope
- Ensure code follows coding standards
- Validate test coverage and results
- Review any new dependencies
- Check for proper documentation

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## How to Test
- Describe the process to test the changes

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added tests (if applicable)
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed
